title: Two Buddies and a Badger
original_title: Knutsen & Ludvigsen og den fæle Rasputin
overview: A zany, musical road movie about two old friends and a badger who embark on an excessively grand adventure. Starring the musical duo Knutsen & Ludvigsen, world famous in Norway.
